summary: A short produced montage with the burned-in overlay text 'PATRIOTISM, NOT GLOBALISM'. Sampled frames include a painting of a mustached man in military uniform on a charging horse with cavalry behind him, and grainy vintage color footage of a city street with mid-century cars and a streetcar.

script.scene: A painting of a uniformed man on a charging horse leading cavalry; overlay text 'PATRIOTISM, NOT GLOBALISM'.
Grainy vintage color footage of a city street with old cars and a streetcar; same overlay text.
